name: Grove v0.0.1-preview
notes_html:
Installation

  1. Download Grove.dmg (always the latest version), or Grove-v0.0.1-preview.dmg for this exact release
  2. Open the DMG and drag Grove to Applications
  3. Right-click → Open on first launch (ad-hoc signed build, until notarization lands)

What's Changed

  • Keep agent/shell sessions alive across switches; add Always Show Agent Tab setting by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/1
  • Add Gumroad license activation with a 7-day trial and startup gate by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/2
  • Fix worktree removal silently no-op'ing after confirming the dialog by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/3
  • Redesign sidebar Git section: status dot, labeled actions, searchable branch switcher by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/5
  • Add GroveUITests scaffold: scheme, test-mode seam, one smoke test by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/6
  • Wider sidebar; drag-and-drop for terminals and the Files tab by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/13
  • Accent color, tabbed Settings redesign, and custom CLI agents by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/14
  • Fix terminal freezes/TUI issues, add Diff tab badge, fix Info.plist warning by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/17
  • Fix oversized folder icon in sidebar workspace rows by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/15
  • Add a Home tab for per-workspace pinned websites by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/18
  • Bump version to 0.0.1-preview by @molayab in https://github.com/molayab/grove/pull/22

Full Changelog: https://github.com/molayab/grove/commits/v0.0.1-preview
